primary_goal: Build authority for UK ecommerce and wholesale automation through high-quality, specific, operator-led articles.
ai_mention_rule: AI may be covered only when it supports controlled workflows, clear review rules and ROI proof.

articles.title: How to reconcile Shopify payouts, orders and fees
articles.topic_type: Commercial operator guide to ecommerce payout reconciliation
articles.trend_search_signal: Current research on 20 July 2026 confirmed durable buyer demand around Shopify payout reconciliation, settlement timing, fees and Xero integration. Shopify states that its payout reconciliation report explains transactions, fees and payouts but is not a revenue statement. Xero promotes daily or transaction-level Shopify sync and payout matching.
articles.primary_search_intent: A UK ecommerce operator or finance lead wants to match Shopify orders, refunds, fees and deposits without rebuilding the month by hand or posting payouts as revenue.
articles.authority_value: Adds a distinct finance-control topic focused on payment clearing, payout IDs, bank matching, exception queues and accounting hand-off. It does not repeat wholesale order entry or general weekly reporting.
articles.duplicate_check: Passed. Existing finance content covers re-keying wholesale orders into Sage or Xero. This article covers payment settlement and bank reconciliation after ecommerce sales.
articles.hemingway_readability_check: Passed editorial check for grade 9 or lower. Short sentences, active voice, plain accounting terms and direct headings were used.
articles.mobile_layout_check: Passed conceptual checks at about 390px and 768px. Width is fluid, the two-column grid collapses, headings use clamp and CTA text can wrap.
articles.ai_mention_check: Passed. AI is not mentioned because it is not needed for payout reconciliation.

articles.title: How to catch product data errors before listings go live
How to stop re-keying wholesale orders into Sage or Xero
Ecommerce AI automation: how to prove the ROI first

The Monday report your ecommerce team should not be building by hand

How to automate supplier price lists for Shopify, Amazon and wholesale channels

quality_rules: Write for UK ecommerce and wholesale operators first.
Every article must read at Hemingway grade 9 or lower.
Do not invent results, statistics, dates, names or testimonials.
Every article needs a clear workflow, decision point or ROI calculation.
AI is one controlled tool, never the offer or a replacement for judgement.
